caption: A group of men, mostly wearing dark suits and ties, are gathered outdoors in a garden-like setting with greenery in the background. Some individuals are seen walking and talking, while others stand in small groups. In the later part of the sequence, the scene shifts to an indoor setting where people are seated around a table with water bottles and glasses. A woman wearing a white head covering is visible among the seated group. Throughout the video, a red news ticker at the bottom consistently displays the text "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है" and the time "10:01 PM". The top of the screen features a "NEWS 18" logo and varying headlines, including "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" and "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". A small "MAHAREDD" logo is also visible on the right side of the lower banner.
